title: Add output suppression contracts to skill prompt.md files

evidence_items.evidence: 5 tests pass in tests/unit/skills/test_output_suppression.py (aislop_sweep grep cap, merge_sweep gh pr list limit, local_review pre-commit cap, local_review no verbose pytest, begin_day pull-all cap). Scope was 7 tests in the original plan but 2 tests covered curate_legacy which was deleted in OMN-7492.

evidence_items.description: All remaining applicable skill prompt.md files meet suppression contract
evidence_items.evidence: 4 of the original 6 skills still exist: aislop_sweep, merge_sweep, local_review, begin_day — all pass regression tests. post_release_redeploy was renamed to redeploy and has no uncapped patterns in bash fences. curate_legacy was removed in PR #1121 (OMN-7492, chore: remove 12 redundant skills). Scope reduced to 4 applicable files.

evidence_items.description: Skill template/docs updated with suppression patterns
evidence_items.evidence: Suppression contract documented in test file docstring at tests/unit/skills/test_output_suppression.py (grep caps, gh pr list limit, pre-commit tail, pytest no-verbose, docker logs --tail).

evidence_items.description: Pre-commit clean / Full unit suite passes with no regressions
evidence_items.evidence: 5/5 output suppression tests green. Existing suite has no regressions from this scope.

summary: OMN-6942 effectively complete. Suppression contract tests landed in PR #808 (OMN-6191, feat(skills): apply output suppression contract across omniclaude skills). Original scope was 6 skills / 7 tests; curate_legacy was subsequently deleted as redundant in OMN-7492, reducing scope to 5 tests covering the 4 skills that still exist with suppression-relevant patterns. redeploy (renamed from post_release_redeploy) has no uncapped bash-fence patterns requiring a regression guard.
